name: microsoft_sysmon
explanation: Microsoft Sysmon is a logs-only integration. The spec contains only a `logs` template that forwards the Windows Event Log channel `Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational` via `type: windows_event`; there is no `instances` block, no Agent metric check, and no check.py implementation. There is no network endpoint to probe and no metric check to dispatch — auto-config in the network-probe sense does not apply. Discovery reduces to 'is Sysmon installed and is its operational event channel emitting on this Windows host?'.
notes: Logs-only integration, identical shape to microsoft_dns (Windows Event Log forwarder). Pattern N analogue.
